package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for go_perf_layer_resource_pooling_http_transport_per_service_method: Layer: Resource pooling. Flag new transports per service method instead of shared clients per upstream.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
func scenario581Negative(ctx context.Context, client *http.Client, urls []string) int {
	total := 0
	for _, url := range urls {
		req, err := http.NewRequestWithContext(ctx, http.MethodGet, url, nil)
		if err == nil && req != nil { total += len(url) }
	}
	return total
}
